sections.paragraph:
προσκρούω (Pl. et al.; POxy 531, 10 [a.d. II]; LXX; TestGad; TestJob 20:5 v.l.; Jos.) to strike against with force, strike against τὶ someth. Mt 7:25 v.l. (for προσπίπτω); 27 v.l. (for προσκόπτω, apparently in the interest of the stronger imagery conveyed by κρούω).

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestGad TestGad = Testament of Gad, s. Test12Patr—List 2

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

someth. someth. = something

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 882
